name: 8MAN-ENTRANCE
short_description: Trapped in a shrine, you must navigate by following rules: proceed unless anomalies occur, turn back if anomalies are found, and reach Hachiman. This walking simulator, inspired by exits like "8 Hachiman," includes sound-based anomalies and mild horror elements. Playtime: 20-60 minutes.
detailed_description:
You are trapped in a shrine.

To get out, you must follow the rules.

Rules:

Proceed if there are no anomalies.

Turn back if you find an anomaly.

Aim for the destination, Hachiman.

A Walking Simulator Inspired by "Hachiman Entrance"

"8 Hachiman Entrance" is a walking simulator inspired by places like the 8th exit.

Sound-based Anomalies

Some anomalies will require identification by sound.

Therefore, the use of speakers or headphones is recommended.

Horror Elements

This game contains some horror elements.

Play Time

Expected playtime is between 20 to 60 minutes.

Video Distribution Guidelines

  • Individuals and organizations alike are allowed to upload and stream videos without prior permission.

  • Monetization is permitted only when using the features provided by the video distribution platform.

  • We would appreciate it if you could include the game’s name in the video or stream title, and add a link to the official page or store page in the description.

  • We bear no responsibility for any damages that may occur as a result of uploading or streaming videos related to this game.

  • These guidelines are subject to change without prior notice.

"Please report bugs here."
